text.message: I can block green longest road
stop lying so u can settle
I already told you I could stop him
Never said I needed the trade
Bro we are playing ranked catan
he literally lost so many cards
obv i wanted to rob red
Whoever speaks the loudest puts himself on the map
Could have picked something else. You steal from the weakest
and i cant block red and blue at the same time
so had to do that, i cant not steal a card
so not like its a huge mismatch between u and blue
but u acting like a child
when i wasnt trying to rob u
and then realised he had 8 cards
what u want me to do
so i don't make an enemy quote unquote
lil bro has an ego problem, ohhh im coming for u
green can u plow red road?
lol im getting robbed so much
like im here as a vessel to help blue win
He got no road and no army
just gonna fight road with red
Ok now he got a chance
bro Ive got a good chance all game akk
but they hyper focussed on me
You got 3 ore from me, I was desperate for them
like even if i didnt get robbed i still wouldnt win
And he wanted to do a dirty one too
tried to make it sneaky haha
yeah ofc me and red gonna fight road while u sneak in win
told y'all, i know black got emotional issues to rob me but red shoulda robbed blue more
